zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Waterton於1350年之後出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Waterton8594歲，母親Lady Constance Assenhull8589歲。他於1398年8月與Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1425年1月17日在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾約克，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾梅瑟利。

nameMeanings.name: Waterton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Waterton was born after 1350, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Richard Waterton, was 8594 and his mother, Lady Constance Assenhull, was 8589. He married Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham in August 1398. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 17 January 1425, in York, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Methley, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Waterton est né après 1350, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Waterton, avait 8594 ans et sa mère, Lady Constance Assenhull, avait 8589 ans. Il a épousé Joan Cecily Fleming d’Everingham en août 1398. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 17 janvier 1425, à York, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterré à Methley, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Watertonが1350年以後にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Watertonは8594歳，母Lady Constance Assenhullは8589歳であった。1398年8月にJoan Cecily Fleming de Everinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1425年1月17日にイギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアヨークで死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアメスリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Waterton(이)가 1350년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Waterton(은)는 8594세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Constance Assenhull(은)는 8589세였다. 그는 1398년 8월 Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1425년 1월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 요르크에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 멧h리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Waterton родился после 1350 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Waterton было 8594 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Constance Assenhull, 8589. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Cecily Fleming de Everingham август 1398 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 17 января 1425 г. в местности ерк, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания и был похоронен в местности метли, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
